summary: postinstall beacon exfiltrates installer identity to pipedream webhook
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle script that unconditionally runs `wget` against a hardcoded Pipedream webhook URL (http://eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net) with query parameters containing the installer's username ($(whoami)), current working directory ($(pwd)), and hostname ($(hostname)). The package ships no library code or advertised functionality — its sole effect on `npm install` is to transmit host identifiers in cleartext to an attacker-controlled endpoint. This is a recon beacon consistent with dependency-confusion / namespace-squat reconnaissance.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
